prestazioni: Replace the stock 1.5L Mazda *Skyactiv-G PY-VPS* (115 PS) with a *Mazda MZR 2.3L DISI Turbo L3-VDT* (from the Mazdaspeed6/MPS) using a *GReddy TD05-18G turbocharger*, *HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold*, and *Cosworth forged pistons* (8.5:1 compression) paired with a *Haltech Elite 2500 ECU* for 320 PS at 6,000 RPM and 400 Nm at 3,500 RPM

Install a *Mazdaspeed6 6-speed manual transmission* with a *PPG close-ratio gear set* (2.12:1 1st gear) and a *Spec Stage 3+ clutch* with a *Chassisworks aluminum flywheel* for durability under high torque

Upgrade the *Mitsuoka-specific rear-wheel-drive subframe* with *Mazdaspeed6 LSD*, *SuperPro poly bushings*, and *BC Racing BR coilovers* (8kg/mm front, 7kg/mm rear) with *Swift Springs* for aggressive camber settings (-2.5° front, -1.8° rear)
estetica: Replace the stock body panels with a *Mitsuoka Rock Star-specific Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit* (20mm wider front fenders, 30mm wider rear) in *3M Gloss Black* with *custom carbon fiber overfenders* for weight reduction

Install *Seibon carbon fiber hood* (with *Mazdaspeed6-style heat extractor vents*) and *custom aluminum rear diffuser* (modeled after the *Nissan S15 Silvia*) with *Aeromotions dual-canard side splitters* for downforce

Swap the stock headlights for *Morimoto XB LED projectors* (with *custom HID retrofits*) and *Mazdaspeed3 rear taillight housings* (smoked with *LED sequential turn signals*), paired with *Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels* (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) in *Gunmetal Bronze*
